subject: Can i build a setlement like this?

posts.body:
Me and My girlfriend cant agree. Can i build a setlement(upgraded it to a city) like this?
All the road on the image allready was in place.
I can't see an issue with any of those buildings.  What specifically about the situation is your girlfriend disputing?
The one with the arrow pointing to it is fine. It is at least two corners away from  the neirest other settlement or city, it is on a road of its own color...it's good!
Is the debated issue that the 2 roads in between white and orange are from different players?  That doesn't matter.  It's 2 intersections apart, regardless of road colors.
I think he's asking whether you can build a settlement between two existing roads (you can).
I don't know what's the problem. Could you be more specific? We don't see any issue
Thanks all! Just needed some support from the heros on the webb 😂
